The '''''Cyclops''''', often abbreviated to simply "''''Clops'''", was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] that was active during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The ship was equipped with two [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]], and was captained by [[Jerg]], whose [[Executive officer/Legends|first mate]] was [[Marie Peeno]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the ''Cyclops'' transported several hundred [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sympathizers from [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] to start a new life in a new colony on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].

{{Ship-stub}}
